urdu transliteration text: Pata chale na ye maa ko, tarap raha hai Husain
english translation text: This mother should not find out that Hussain’s corpse is restless

urdu transliteration text:
Salaam uspe jo thera zameen pe teeron ki,
Woh jisne sajda e haq me lahoon jabeen rakhi
english translation text:
Peace on him whose body was on arrows
He, who placed a bloodied forehead in righteous prostration

urdu transliteration text:
Tha dasto paaki ye saakin ke chal rahi thi churi
Who saans roke huwe tha ke maa tarhane thi
english translation text:
His holy hands were still as the dagger slashed (across his neck)
He ceased breathing as his mother was by his headside

urdu transliteration text: Bohot sukoon se khuda ki taraf chala hai Hussain
english translation text: With ease, Hussain has returned to His Lord

urdu transliteration text: Pata chale na ye maa ko, tarap raha hai Husain
english translation text: This mother should not find out that Hussain’s corpse is restless

urdu transliteration text:
Jo mera farz tha amma adaa kiya mai ne
Zameen main lasha e asghar chupa diya mai ne
english translation text:
O mother, I have fulfilled my responsibility
I hid the dead body of  my Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
Jawaan bete ka laasha utha liye mai ne
Me abhi bhi Pyaasa hoon paani nahi piya mene
I am still thirsty, I havent drank water yet
english translation text: I picked up the body of my young son

urdu transliteration text:
Ghamoon se bhayi ke tooti hui hai meri kamar
Jigar se akbar-e-mehroo ke katra hai jigar
english translation text:
Grief has broken my back
My chest is bleeding for my Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Khuda ka shukr ada kar raha hun laashon per
Na roye aap boht mutmain hoon mai maadar
Please don’t cry O mother, I am pleased
english translation text: I am being thankful to my Lord despite losing my beloved

urdu transliteration text:
Meri hi godh mei bacha huwa mera bejaan
Jigar se apne jawaan ke nikali mene sina
english translation text:
In my laps, my son took his last breath
From his chest I pulled the spear

urdu transliteration text:
Gale pe shimr jo khanjar ye ho raha hai raavaan
Bas akhri ye mera imtehaan hai amma
english translation text:
This dagger that Shimr is cutting my neck with
This is my final test, O mother

urdu transliteration text:
Zameen ye aa na saki raas koi baat nahi
Nahi madad ko koi paas koi baat nahi
english translation text:
This land was not for me, but its fine
There is no one to help me, but its fine

urdu transliteration text:
Zameen ye aa na saki raas koi baat nahi
Nahi madad ko koi paas koi baat nahi
english translation text:
This land was not for me, but its fine
There is no one to help me, but its fine

urdu transliteration text:
Huwi na khatam meri pyaas koi baat nahi
Khuda ko dediya abbas koi baat nahi
english translation text:
My thirst hasn’t been quenched, but its fine
I gave My Abbas to my Lord, but its fine.
